park_name: BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces Holiday Park

reviews.review_text: 4th stay here, facilities clean and staff are great. The best location too.
Have stayed here a number of times and the always do a great job making sure there is enough for the kids to do and with beautiful views.
wonderful.

Highly recommend this park. We stayed here on a power site. Adrian, Kane and Kylie ( as well as other staff) were extremely helpful. We had the most awesome views. Amenities were large, very clean and most of all - heated.
The park provided an awesome fire pit of a night (across the road from the ocean) and they provided marshmallows! They also put on a "light" show of a nighttime for kids.
The camp kitchen is also well set out with really good BBQs.
We cannot fault this park at all. In 16years of our travelling, this is the best park.

Great place to stay with a caravan. Lovely large sites that cater for your van, annex & car. Faux grass so that you are not walking mud into your van. Amenities large & clean. Staff very friendly, felt very welcomed & my wife was even given a Mother’s Day gift- lovely touch.
Highly recommend this caravan park.

Hallo zusammen, lese hier die wunderschönen Kommentare zu diesem Campingplatz! Das kann ich auch so bestätigen, aber wir mussten für uns und unserem kleinen van 109 AUD bezahlen! Wir waren über fünf Wochen in Australien unterwegs, aber für diesen Preis nie! Wie gesagt, alles super, aber der Preis ist schlichtweg viel zu teuer! Deswegen, nur wegen dem Preis, nein Danke! Am anderen Ende von Apollo bay ist noch ein Campingplatz!

A massive thank you to the staff! They organized a spectacular seaview site for our anniversary that was both peaceful and perfectly situated. The hospitality here is top-notch. It’s clear they care about their guests' special moments. Clean facilities and a great atmosphere. We will definitely be back!
There for a friend's 70th birthday.
Stayed for 3 nights had a great cabin with a fantastic view. A fabulous park if you have kids lots for them to do. Cabin as advertised.

Had a short 2 day stay whilst doing the Great Ocean Drive.
Little cabin was great and staff were very helpful and always had smiles on faces.
Had a faulty powerpoint and I needed to charge the EV, they allocated the bay across the road  for the stay to allow for the re-charge.
Will stay again

Emplacement camping-car bien. Sanitaire impeccable. Accueil parfait.
Les big4 sont mes préférés
This place is wonderful, especially for families. I definitely recommend!! Close to town, heated pool, jump pad, game room, all the things to keep the kids happy 😁

Wow! Just wow! This is by far the best caravan park I have ever stayed at. Upon check in we were brightly greeted, provided with marshmallows, sticks, kids activity packs and scavenger hunts.
The sites were huge and we had both synthetic grass and grass which was in great condition.
The whole park is really well maintained with staff regularly restocking the sand for the digger at the playground, building the fire in the fire pit each night and constantly rebuilding the jenga set for the kids.
All the staff were friendly and genuinely seem to love and enjoy what they do.
Bathrooms on first impression seemed a little aged, but the standard showers were HUGE (bigger than some “family bathrooms”
I have used) with 4+ hooks and great shower pressure! They were also very clean.
The firepit was stocked each night, ready to go and had a grill on top that we used to cook one of the nights.
Camp kitchens were great also, with plenty of space and clean.
Location was fantastic, right opposite the beach and we listened to the waves all day and night.
My only (nit picking) feedback is that there is not enough recycling and bottle/can bins. We were staying near the playground and it would benefit for more recycling and can bins.

We had such a wonderful stay at Apollo Bay BIG4! The park was clean, well-maintained, and had fantastic amenities that made our trip so comfortable and enjoyable. We stayed in the beachfront tent, and it was our first time trying something like that—it exceeded all our expectations. Falling asleep to the sound of the ocean and waking up right by the beach was an amazing experience. Our teenagers absolutely loved it too, which made the trip even more special. We created such great memories here and would definitely love to come back again. Highly recommend for families looking for a fun and relaxing getaway!

Just one small suggestion: it may be helpful to place a sign in the shared TV room reminding guests to be respectful and considerate of others using the space, so everyone can enjoy the communal area comfortably.

Our family had an amazing stay at BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces.
We took the trip with 2 other families.
The park had great amenities. The kids loved the playground. We made use of the BBQ and firepit areas. Coffee van lady was lovely. We enjoyed the light show each night. The cabins and grounds were clean and well kept. And the location was superb! I would not hesitate to come back and would highly recommend to all!!!

Stunning place to stay! Lots of fun activities for the kids to do. Big jumphouse and light and sound  show every night. The staff are very friendly and welcoming. We can't wait to stay again! (We stayed in September 25' and can't wait to return!)

Another amazing stay here for a week in our caravan. We had a group with some in cabins and some in vans. The team here are so so friendly and the school holiday program was a hit with the kids. I’d love it if their face painting for kids was on earlier so they could enjoy it all day instead of just before bed. Jumping pillow being under cover was a god send with the weather being so wet. Bathrooms were always heated and clean. We will definitely be back! Thanks again.
Emplacement fonctionnel pour camping-car et installations propres, modernes et confortables
Full
What a great location to stay whilst visiting this part of Victoria.
Best big 4 we’ve stayed in. The extra mile on the service and standards of the park makes the stay really quality and comfortable experience. The views are amazing.

We found the Blanket Bay tent a very clean and well appointed place to stay. The set up on the balcony with the ocean view was simply elite! Our boys had a great time playing in the games room, jumping on the under cover blow-up pillow and swimming in the pool. Thanks for the awesome hospitality - we will be back!
Great location, great park and very clean.  Well done to all the team and especially Jenny at the front desk.

This is a very luxurious caravan park.
The facilities are next level with things we have never seen before in a park like their indoor disco/lighting display room which is doubled as a giant jumping pillow at other times.

Other things included a fireplace,massive playgrounds with flying fox, water play, pump track, pool, games room, food trucks, daily coffee van and more.

100m water to beach but a 2km. walk to town.
Beautiful spot. Very well maintained park. Staff very helpful and friendly
Came for Easter and rented one of the cabins. They ask $500 a night for 2 star accommodation. We went to the Mirage resort in Queensland that wasn't as expensive.

Stayed in glamping tents for four nights and sad it wasnt longer. Kids had a blast with all there was to do. Listening to the ocean falling asleep was so loud, but so soothing. Staff were friendly and informative. Location was perfect for beach walks. We watched dolphins from our deck. Only downfall was the light show time was mucked up and the ladies weren't interested in apologising for the 30 min delay when everyone showed up with small kids on time provided. This is just some feedback and doesn't warrant a lesser rating. All in all a fabulous time and would love to return one day for a little longer stay! Thanks for having us!

We had the best time at Apollo Bay BIG4! This was our first time staying at a BIG4 and we were so impressed—we’ll definitely be booking again.

There was so much for the kids to enjoy. They absolutely loved the light show, marshmallow roasting, jumping pillow, and the pool. It made the whole stay really special for them.

Such a great family-friendly place—we can’t wait to come back!

Stayed in caravan on suite site facilities were terrific great caravan park very clean and extremely well maintained. All staff were friendly and helpful. Very pleasant stay Apollo Bay is a beautiful town every we went locals were friendly and hospitable the whole town is clean and well maintained you could see the locals take great pride in their town. We loved the place and will be happy to visit again.
Best caravan park cabin I have stayed in.
Wonderful place to stay for families, I would highly recommend the cabins. They were amazing.

An absolute show stopper. I will be back here. Such an amazing Caravan Park, especially for those with families, the amenities, the location, the views, everything was perfect for us. The staff were so friendly and accomodating, even when my child needed first aid they made called and did everything they could to help. This is one not to miss, and we nearly did as chat gpt recommended another park, but I found this one and I’m so glad we did. Thank you for your accomodation!

Had an amazing mini getaway here. We had 2 Ocean View Delux Cabins. They were very well appointed and beautifully situated to watch the sunrise and sunset. The park is well maintained and the staff are super friendly and helpful. We will definitely be back again. Hope to make this our regular family holiday spot.Highly recommend it.
Apollo Bay is a great place.

Our stay in the cabin was fantastic! The beachfront location is perfect, and the kids loved all the play options. We found the cabin to be clean and fully stocked with everything we required, while the staff at reception were incredibly welcoming. Looking back, we definitely should have booked a longer visit!

We stayed on a van site, the site was great the amenities immaculately clean as were the camp kitchen and other facilities. The staff were great , very friendly and very helpful . We actually extended our stay by an extra day.
Great place to stay, big wide caravan site. Great view of the ocean from our sites. Highly recommended.

I've visited the Big4 before in different locations, but big4 Apollo Bay pisces is very  different and one of the places I enjoyed the most. They have a wonderful team (excellent service), the place is very clean, and the staff are friendly and always smiling. My best days were spent at big4 Apollo Bay pisces
Thank you for everyone in Big4 apollo bay
Fantastic position right on the beach cabins were well appointed and comfortable

Great caravan park with good facilities, and an awesome sound and light show. Drainage points are needed considering it’s over $100 per night for a powered site and people’s grey water is flowing onto the grass. Definitely wouldn’t stay during peak season because of the shear cost and hustle and bustle but good facilities. Very spread out and we weren’t as close to bathrooms and camp kitchen as we would have liked. Cabins closer to toilet blocks makes no sense. Playgrounds, jumping pad, water play area all fantastic. Flat level sites with nice views. Liked that I was able to select my own site when I arrived as it was $211 for two adults and a child for two nights. Location on a hill makes it trickier for kids with little bikes and busy roads and it’s a bit further out than the centre of town. Would stay again but not sure if anyone will be able to afford to with fuel prices going the way they are.
Wow wow wow. What a great team here at big 4 Apollo bay. So friendly and the site is perfect for families. Bag of marshmallows on arrival for the fire was a nice touch. Highly recommend.
FANTASTIC! Location, service, facilities - every detail is thought of! Absolutely loved our stay. Kids had a blast, as did the adults. We'll be back for sure.
Superfriendly staff, top position and amenities, surprise show on evenings and loads of entertainment for kids and “kids inside”. Liked the herbs garden very much - such a nice idea!
Lovely getaway for us.
Great spot and a lovely park. Will like to revisit again one day
Unreal. Will certainly be back. Very clean park. Well done on managing this park, should be proud

We very much enjoyed staying in this holiday park.  We stayed in a 2 bedroom beach house and had great views of the ocean.  The cabin was a good size and very clean.  The kitchen had all the appliances and utensils we needed.

The park is very well run and organised.  They have a great recycling system which includes food waste.  There was entertainment and a food truck on the Saturday night which we really enjoyed.  The gardens are well looked after.

The park is in good proximity to the local shops and to explore the Great Ocean Road.

We highly recommend this caravan park.  In fact, this was the best caravan park we have stayed in.

We stayed at big 4 Apollo bay for 3 nights mid week. The park was well kept, bathrooms were very clean and the staff are incredibly helpful. The park looks fantastic for families with loads of activities to do for the kids. When we arrived the lovely receptionist placed us in a site right near the playground area as it had the best view of the nearby beach. We really appreciated that but wanted something a little quieter as we don't have kids. The receptionist was more than happy to move us as the park was nice and quiet. Our new spot was perfect for us so we were very happy. The powered sites are spacious and flat. The sites had great drainage and when it rained we didn't get soggy ground all around our camper trailer. The bathrooms and showers were great and clean, laundry was also great with a change machine there too. Definitely one of the best caravan parks we have had the privilege of staying at. Well done!

Very friendly and helpful lady when we checked in, and it only got better, loved our site we were allocated, I couldn’t fault the park in anyway, toilets and showers large and very clean.
Great location, walk or drive to town
The park is well maintained and we loved the fire pit. If we hadn’t booked other stays along the way, we would have stayed longer at Apollo Bay.

20/03/26 - stayed here again, long overdue, renewed Big4 Membership, this park is the BEST!
Always updating facilities, loved the new additions, Nautilus, and the evening light/sound/laser show, the evening fire is still awesome 👌 Our beach house, Eliza Jane, was clean and well equipped with a fabulous view. Just love it here, can't wait to book again. Staff are always so friendly.
Thank you 😊
Always the best place to stay. Short walk into town, awesome views, beach houses are well equipped, clean, very friendly, love the firepit, love the coffee cart. Top spot!
Really beautiful place that was very well maintained. Great caravan sites, clean facilities, friendly and helpful staff, water views.

Had the pleasure of staying in a 3 bedroom cabin with sea views .
Was very comfortable and views were spectacular.
The park is so neat and tidy with everything you need .
Check in staff, Nolene, was very helpful and informative.
We didn’t have kids but it’s a kids dream . Zipliner , light shows, big jenga.
Short walk into town and all it has to offer .
There’s even a coffee van with the very friendly Wendy .
Definitely recommend!
Third Sunday is the farmers market .
Highly recommend! Loved everything about our stay. Perfect for families

An elevated view so you can see a bit of ocean.
The highlight was the nightly light show they do for the kids. Lots of lasers and projected images in a huge dome. Take your little ones
Deluxe cabins aren't exactly deluxe. Powered sites were everything you could ask for. Pool could do with an upgrade and more regular clean. Ocean views were brilliant. Price was questionable.
Great Park - Was a walking distance to the shops (about 35min) but good exercise :P great facilities, entertainment and kids park and pool. Will visit again

Our cabin didn’t have working tv (error of weak or no signal) nor could we put heating on.
Amenities in park were great for cooking and kids  especially the coffee van on site.
Staff were very disrespectful to our group over group being chatty on balcony at night. Tony came the next morning to our friend’s cabin to threaten to call police on us and evict us. No discussion. No communication. We have video evidence if anyone wanting this to prove our calmness and his dismissal and threats. If you go in a group, stay in the games room to talk - this alternative was not offered to us - just the beach which is ridiculous with kids at night. Shame we overpaid for a long weekend and ended up feeling caged in and scared to talk to eachother. Staff were lingering at the base of our balcony listening to us and it was creepy. I’ve owned a caravan for 20 years and never had this experience. We will never go back.

This place is AMAZING! Our kids had the best time which in turn meant, so did we. Close to all the places to explore. The park facilities were all well maintained. Plenty for the kids to do. But it was the little extras that really made it fantastic. The marshmallow roasting and the nightly movie and light show. Would absolutely recommend this place!

Good place to stay whilst travelling great ocean road. Good friendly staff. Clean amenities. Nice ocean view sites with synthetic grass. Stayed during March 2026 at $80 per night 2 adults.
Little old school mining station in kids play area.
Perfect Apollo Bay destination
We had a powered site. The park was very clean and well fitted out.

We recently stayed at Pisces Apollo Bay for a planned 2 night stay. Unfortunately our jockey Wheel broke when setting up at Kennett River campground and they weren't very helpful. So rang Pisces Apollo Bay to see if we could come a day earlier than expected. They shuffled things (as they were booked out for the weekend) to accommodate us and gave us a lovely site. Kane, one of the maintenance men was a Godsend. He helped us park and manage without the jockey Wheel and then fixed the jockey Wheel and refused our offer of beer or wine. What a legend!!! Park was very busy but has great amenities. Not cheap but nowhere is on this stretch of the GOR. Amenities regularly cleaned and live entertainment on Saturday evening. Thanks Pisces Apollo Bay. Would thoroughly recommend.
Fantastic park with lots of activities for the kids. The staff were very helpful and the park was extremely well maintained.

Wir hatten einen Ensuite Platz gebucht und bekommen. Alles super sauber, sehr schön gelegen. Tolle Campkitchen, perfekte Laundry.
Das Personal war immer freundlich und hilfsbereit, haben alles erklärt und Tips gegeben. Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder.

A great spot, not super busy but still plenty of people around. The cabins were clean, neat and well presented. Loved the initiative to promote a worm farm for vegetable waste and provide the bins to do it, a cool little recycling box as well. Great work. Love it when a business gets behind this kind of thing.

A huge amount of kids activities from nightly light show, marshmallows to roast, a scavenger hunt and games room.

The only small call put was I obviously caught one of the reception blokes before he had his morning coffee and was a bit snappy/short when I was letting them know of a need we had in the cabin (not unreasonable) to His credit, after a coffee I'm assuming he came down to the cabin to give an update on the service team who were coming, and was a completely different person.

Other than that the staff were amazing and had a wonderful time.

Don't forget to get a coffee or 3 from Wendy in the blue caravan at the playground from 0730. Not to be missed

Just wrapped up 2 nights in one of the glamping beach tents here and honestly, it was amazing. If you’re on the fence about glamping, this is the place to do it—you get the ocean breeze and that camping feel but with a proper bed and all the comforts.

The park itself is huge and there’s so much for both kids and adults to do with a heated pool, kids pump track, large playground, fire pits and the night light show was memorable. It’s a nice quiet spot with only a short couple of minutes drive into Apollo Bay proper. Definitely coming back for a longer stay next time!

This is one of the most friendly and welcoming caravan parks going around. Magnificent facilities and our site had a magnificent view with plenty of room for our large van. To top it off we were welcomed with a gift for our wedding anniversary something that doesn’t happen a lot. Thanks Katie and Julie for your polite and helpful information at the check in desk. Definitely we will be back. Regards Matt and Jo

We stayed one night at Pisces Apollo Bay and our powered site was awesome.  Astro turf so we didn't carry sand into our van, neat drainage and power system.  Toilets/showers impeccable, so many things to do at the site itself but we didn't have time to enjoy them.  We watched the light and sound show which was a great event for old/young alike - all the kids there were absolutely buzzing with excitement and it was heartwarming to see.
So impressed with the planning and care taken to make the site accessible to those with visible/invisible disabilities.
Great place to stay!
Great staff and facilities are first class.
Great great facilities.

The only regret we have about this place is not staying an extra day! We stayed in four different places during our trip to Victoria and this is definitely my kids’ favorite. The playground is awesome and so is the fire pit for marshmallows. The cabin is very clean, with no extra clutter in the kitchen, just the basic utensils and appliances you need for a short holiday, which I really like. The coffee from the van on-site is fantastic and such a treat to have there. Beautiful view and you can hear the sea waves at night from the balcony… it’s just soooo peaceful.

From the moment we pulled in with our van we were greeted with amazing staff and beautiful views. This place is a kids paradise. Everything was wonderful, from the coffee van in the mornings, the light show at night, fairy garden and amazing playground. Staff were lovely, grounds keepers very helpful and reception staff all friendly. Very clean bathrooms and grounds. Easy to walk to the beach and a short distance to town. Only downside was we did not stay longer.

We spent 4 beautiful nights with our caravan on an elevated slab site with ocean views. Our welcome on arrival was friendly & informative, the perfect start! The park is well positioned on the edge of town, walking distance to shops, restaurants & brewery's. We enjoyed a famous scallop pie at the bakery too. 10/10 for all Piesces Big 4 staff, you care about the service you provide & we appreciated it. Thank you

Fantastic place for the kids, endless streams to activites and well thought out entertainment. Rooms are comfy and well equipped, easy to navigate and well maintained throughout - it's about as easy as it gets when you're away from home.

A really enjoyable stay. Room was excellent and staff fantastic. Quiet even though close to road. Rooms very clean and everything worked. Room very well equipped. A fair walk into town was the only negative but we knew this before booking and were ok with it. May not suit everyone

We were in a caravan, so will have to give 5 stars despite not knowing what those facilities were like. But if they’re anything like the presentation, cleanliness, facilities of the rest of the park they would deserve that rating. Great location. Fantastic staff.
Incredible facilities and such kind and helpful staff. Already booked my next stay. Highly recommend, especially for families.

We had a fantastic stay! From the little touches to the big investments in facilities, this is a great caravan park to stay at with kids. Playground, pump track, water play, jumping pad, marshmallows, scavenger hunt... And all with a beautiful view. Loved that there was a coffee van each morning. Saturday night there was live music, bubbles, hula hoops, a food truck and face painting. It set such a great atmosphere and everyone was just having a great relaxed time. We will return, likely every year!

Absolutely loved this Caravan Park! From the minute we arrived, service was fantastic a the facilities are fab. The staff were so friendly and welcoming. They gave us a fun hunt for the kids to do (with a prize at the end) and a bag of marshmallows for the kids (and us) to enjoy at the fire pit. The lady told me about a free yoga class for guests the following morning which I went to and it was idillic. We also went along to the light and sound show they put on every night. We stayed for two nights so we got to watch two different ones and they were fantastic. You learned a little about the local area and then watched an amazing light and sound show after. Highly recommend this Caravan Park and we will hopefully visit again in the future. Thank you.

Absolutely wonderful caravan parks !
Great location, excellent facilities and beautiful people.
Can’t wait to go back 🏖️❤️

Probably the best caravan park we have stayed in. Travelling in 2 vans with children & grandchildren & the staff went out of their way to make us welcome, park us next to each other, near playground & a small toilet block. You can walk to town from here. There is so much on offer daily plus extra free activities for all the family during the week. Amazing park to stay at & so clean.

We stayed at Big4 Apollo Bay Pisces for 8 nights and absolutely loved it.
We originally booked a deluxe two‑bedroom cabin and checked in without any issues, spending our first night there comfortably. The following morning, however, we noticed that the maintenance team was replacing the decking a couple of cabins down from ours, which understandably created some noise. As we were travelling with a 6‑month‑old who sleeps during the day, we politely asked reception if it would be possible to move to a quieter cabin. The staff were incredibly helpful and promptly relocated us to another cabin away from the maintenance work. The new cabin was fantastic—very modern, beautifully presented, and well positioned.
Beyond the cabin itself, the park is exceptionally well maintained and clean. Our 4‑year‑old daughter absolutely loved the facilities, especially the jumping castle, pool, playground, and the night light shows. We also really enjoyed starting our mornings with coffee from the van—special mention to the lovely lady who makes consistently excellent coffee.
A highlight of our stay was the Saturday afternoon live music and food truck event, which we thoroughly enjoyed, and my wife loved the yoga class, with the ocean view.

All of the staff at the park were friendly, welcoming, and polite, which really added to the overall experience.

The location is also perfect—right across from the beach and only 1 km from the centre of Apollo Bay, with its great selection of shops and restaurants.
We highly recommend this park and would happily stay again.

we stayed with our camper trailer on a powered grass site.
Great views, clean and well
appointed facilities.
The staff were exceptional.
We Loved the music on Saturday night.
what a beautiful park…we had a powered site with the best views in the park! Staff were wonderful and the light show next level

What an amazing place to stay. From the view on arrival to the bag of marshmallows and scavenger hunt handed over on check in we were blown away at every turn. The facilities were amazing, the jumping pad, games room, light show and playground were all amazing. The staff were lovely. We had an amazing time there. Also loved the little touch of zooper doopers in the freezer.

2026.2.1-2.4
4天3夜的大洋路露營車之旅，從墨爾本機場租出直接開過來營地。環境維護的很好，工作人員友善，面向海視野佳，還有小孩很愛的遊樂場，是個很棒的露營區，推薦大家可以來體驗。
Clean and lovely position, so near the ocean and a decent walk into Apollo Bay.

My wife and I stayed in one the the Safari Tents and it was outstanding. Stunning ocean views from private deck and the tent was more like a luxury cabin where the term “glamping” is probably an understatement.
Our stay was amazing. Staff are great our cabin was new and clean. All the facilities are amazing. Heated pool the kids loved. The light show was next level. Would stay again.

Honestly I love Big 4s and have a membership with Big4. This is my favorite of all of them so far! First mention goes to the beautiful people who work there. They provided us with such genuine kindness and service and are absolute angels. We travelled as a group (family) in 3 cabins and they made sure we were situated right near each other. They also sent text msgs throughout our stay to update us on upcoming events such as a food truck attending the park at 5pm.

The cabins were spotless and clean, the beds and linen were extremely comfortable. The kitchen was filled with everything we needed. The TV was a generous size and we just logged into our Netflix account while we were there.

This Big 4 is amazing for children! They have a park with flying fox and water play feature. They have a games room, bbq areas, fire pit for marshmallow roasting, and a huge jumping pad!
They have light shows on at night and a projector screen cinema with Australian stories/tales made from a beautiful light display.

The pool is on the smaller side but large enough for multiple families to swim and play in, and it is heated! We swam in the pool on a cold and rainy day as it was heated so well.

Five stars all around! This was the best big 4 we have stayed at! Thankyou so much Pisces Apollo Bay!
The place was amazing will definitely be back with my family. First camping trip and loved it kids had so much activities and was just the best highly recommend

We stayed over the Australia Day long weekend on a powered camping site. It was our first camping trip as a family.  Fantastic shared shower and toilet, and shared kitchen facilities. The playground is fantastic for kids and they put on an entertaining music and food truck night on the weekend. The view out to the river is beautiful, and like all Big4 locations, you feel absolutely comfortable having the kids ride around the park on their bikes. Hot tip! If you're camping for the first time, make sure you have strong pegs. The ground is very firm and our standard pegs bent in the ground. We were saved by neighbours offering their pegs and buying long strong ones from the local hardware store.

We'll be back!

We had a really lovely experience at BIG4 Apollo Bay. The communication from start to finish was clear and easy, and the customer service was exceptionally friendly. The staff genuinely made us feel welcome and went out of their way to make sure every need was catered to.

During the fire evacuation situation along the Great Ocean Road, every concern we had was handled with care and professionalism, which we really appreciated. It made a stressful time feel far more manageable knowing we were in good hands.

It is honestly the most family friendly park we have ever stayed at. The atmosphere, facilities, and overall experience were perfect for kids and parents alike.

We would absolutely stay again and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this park to others.

We stayed in the tent area and were very happy with our experience. The shared facilities were very clean and well maintained. The campsite was comfortable and well organized, making it a great place to relax and enjoy nature.
Beautiful location, very clean estate! Bathrooms and all amenities were very well maintained and presented daily. We enjoyed our stay and would love to come back again !

This is our second stay here, and we have loved our time here again. Perfect for kids with a big playground, tons of kids activities and a heated pool that my girls love. Plus a beach opposite. The place is always clean and tidy with helpful staff. Will defiantly come for a third time.

It was our first stay in a Big4 and I was so impressed! The amenities for kids were enough to stay entertained for days! Our cabin and all of the communal spaces were very clean. Would definitely go back!
The best experience we've had when it comes to Big 4. Loved every minute of it. Kids loved it, we had a ball. Staff was best and facilities were amazing. We will be back soon.
Lovely staff, park was all the activities you need, the jump pad & light show was great! solar heated pool was a blessing for me & the kids!

We’ve just returned from a week of action at the Big 4, in Apollo Bay - although the weather left a lot to be desired, the whole family had a ball! The cabins were clean, and completed with all the necessary kitchen essentials (including salt and pepper!!!!). The jumping pad was a huge hit, filling in the gaps between activities, and the playground and water play were great when the weather was playing nice too! We particularly loved the Family Disco, Live Music and Food Trucks and the Light Show! Highly recommend a stay over the Summer Holidays - everything outside the Big 4 in Apollo Bay is an added bonus!! There’s no real need to leave 👌🏼
Our needs kept changing. Staff went above and beyond to help with every request

Man, what a beautiful experience.
Kids had the best time with their uncle and cousin
Me and wifey had enjoyed out time too
Love this place
We were unable to attend because of the fires and couldn't get through. The staff were so helpful in such short notice to help sort this out. We can't wait until we are able to get back to see them
Jordan in reception and Tony have been so kind, helpful and generous. Really polite and great problem solvers. Thank you.
Great Facilities and Everything was very clean. Also just behind the Park at the road up to Mariners Lookout we seen a Koala sat chilling in a tree.
Amazing stay, perfect for families!
Great Park, great activities for kids. Yoga, live music, possibly the best family park on Great Ocean Rd.

What an amazing experience all round!
The staff are friendly and so helpful.
The location is absolutely stunning with a gorgeous ocean view, and the cabin was wonderful.

A Standout Stay at Apollo Bay’s Best Caravan Park

From the moment we arrived, it was clear this caravan park is a cut above the rest. Perfectly positioned with sweeping views of both the water and surrounding trees, it strikes a balance between natural beauty and thoughtful design.

The sites are well laid out with easy access to a wide range of amenities. While there are too many to mention, the highlights include spotless, heated bathrooms and a modern kitchen—comforts that make all the difference after a day of exploring.

What truly sets this park apart, however, is the staff. Their warm hospitality and willingness to go above and beyond create a welcoming atmosphere that’s hard to find. When we realized we had forgotten our camper’s power lead, the team immediately stepped in to help. Their quick response and determination to source a replacement was nothing short of impressive.

All in all, this park offers the perfect blend of location, facilities, and service. For anyone visiting Apollo Bay, it’s an outstanding choice—and one we’ll absolutely be returning to.

We had the most awesome 5 day break here during the September school holidays. I honestly can't recommend BIG4 enough to families with young kids. We stayed in a deluxe, 2br cabin and it was fantastic. Comfortable, had everything we needed, and well situated. Kids rode scooters around the park each day, coffee van each morning was an awesome perk, as was the sound and light show, kids club and undercover play area. We barely needed to leave the park! We could hear the waves at night which was so lovely, and the bi-weekly facepainting and live music afternoons were the cherry on top. I also feel it's important to acknowledge the incredible helpfulness and consideration of staff. Not just when directly asked for help, but also in general. For example, as I was walking past a 'staff only' door one day, I overheard two young men talking as they were moving around communal areas doing what I assume was routine cleaning tasks, and one said to the other "There's a group in the camp kitchen talking and having a cuppa, so don't go in there yet, and I'll vacuum later - let's not bother them." This just shows that there is generally an excellent culture and attitude among staff where they genuinely care about their guests and customers. As a guest, I can say that this is deeply appreciated and respected - so thank you to all staff who helped us in various ways throughout our stay. The park amenities are great (laundry, games room, playground, pump track, pool, undercover jumping pillow, camp kitchen, tv/lounge room) and the views of the bay area spectacular. We had a great break and will definitely be back.

We stayed in the 3 BR cabins with a panoramic ocean view of the rolling waves. Communication prior to and at checkin was friendly and flexible. Great activities for family with the light show and jumping pillow area. The cabins were perfectly appointed for accomodating up to 7 in separate rooms with a large dining table and kitchen.  Built in laundry, balcony and 2 TVs made it perfect for a longer stay.  The onsite coffee van is a a welcome treat in the morning and staff were so helpful.  We'e love to come back in summer so we could walk across the road to the scenic and expansive beach. Highly recommend suitable for short or longer stays.

This is the first time I’ve stayed at a Big 4 and it was such a great experience. My partner and I came with our 4 year old and we loved it! The staff were very friendly. Our cabin was very clean and everything was up to date, a nice touch was some zooper dippers in the freezer. We also got given marshmallows on check in and went down to the fire pit one night, which was so fun. The park was great and the coffee van on sight is genius. The pool was great and a favourite of my 4 year olds as well and the jumping pad. But our most favourite part was the light show, wow I have never seen anything like it. We will definitely come back again and we will be staying longer next time. Thank you!
We loved our stay, it was a real pleasure, your park was one of the cleanest and well maintained parks. Your staff are welcoming and full of helpful  info.

We stayed for a weekend in one of the clamping tents (2 adults 1 child), we were very lucky as our tent had ocean views so we could sit on the balcony and watch the waves roll in.
Lots to do at the resort - movies each day for the kids (or adults too), play ground, pool, jumping pillow, camp fire for marshmallows and it is an easy walk into the Main Street for lunch/dinner etc.
Was a lovely stay.
Great clean park. Amenities block are very clean and spacious.  Great views . The sound and light show and the animated short film were great for kids and adults.

We recently stayed 5 nights on a caravan powered site.
The team were so helpful on arrival with some guidance to back onto the site. The view from our site over the sea was fantastic. The facilities were so clean and catered for all.
We went to the light and sound show that was exceptional... the drinks and nibbles were unexpected and a nice touch.
We would not hesitate to recommend and visit again.

We are a family of 5 (2 adults 3 kids), we stayed one night in a beach front glamping tent. We were truly impressed by the whole experience - the incredible view, playground, heated pool, marshmallows to toast by the open fire, unexpectedly great lights show, bouncy pillow.. we would happily have stayed another week. We have been to quite a few Big4 accommodations but this one is truly a great stop.

We had a great stay at BIG4 Apollo Bay.
The park, facilities and activities were all excellent.
We were greeted pleasantly by the Ladies at reception and guided precisely onto our site by Cain which we greatly appreciated, thanks Mate.
Great place to stay, close to beach. Lovely staff fun for kids
Amazing place to visit, staff were friendly and super helpful. Lots for the kiddo to see and do.

Beautiful place overlooking the ocean.
Ensuite site was clean and well maintained. Night light show and live music was a pleasant surprise.
Great views, spacious caravan sites

The effort the owner goes to to keep the place in tip-top condition is extraordinary, the bathrooms are heated, and quite roomy showers so thete is no chance for clothing to get wet. They just spent $750 000 on a spectacular light show for everyone to enjoy. The beach is a short walk away with cabins overlooking the coast line.
Best site we have ever had, so flat and perfect, fabulous view. The park is so well kept and your staff are outstanding. Ensuite site  number 8.
stayed in non powered site  everything clean and tidy  well presented

Fantastic!
Amazing facilities and activities for the whole family, kids loved it, cabins were clean, service was great. Highly highly recommend!
We brought our bushwalking group to Pisces as a base for 4 days of hiking along sections of the Great Ocean Walk and on trails in the Otways.  Ideal location, excellent facilities.

Older style but comfy. Great showers. But you share facilities.
Great Host Sam. Loved the peace and tranquillity.
Great location overlooking the bay.  The sites are spacious and well maintained.  Excellent service and location.

Stayed in an unpowered campsite. We had a great view of the ocean.

This park has everything you need. Nice warm showers (big cabins and the water has great pressure), very tidy, loads of activities for kids and adults.

The personal is super friendly and helpful. I felt very welcomed.

This is one of the best parks I stayed during my 3 months van trip through australia.

Highly recommend this place. We’ve stayed ay a few Big4s now and this was by far our family favourite. Our cabin was spotless & all facilities throughout the park were cleaned, well maintained and in working condition. Staff were very lovely & helpful. The view was stunning. So much for children.

Fun for kids and relaxing for adults. The water park, marshmallow toasting, movie nights and jumping pillow were highlights for our 4yo. The scavenger hunt and frozen Zooper Doopers were nice touches. The beach across the road was beautiful. The coffee van on site was great at 7:30 in the morning to start the day looking at the bay. We had ocean views from our Deluxe Cabin and ocean sounds to put us to sleep. Staff were very friendly and helpful with our kids.
facilities were excellent and staff super friendly!

We stayed in powered caravan sites with an ocean view. The park is in a perfect position and the grounds are super clean and tidy. The check in was fast and the van spots are level and spacious. Bathrooms are large and clean, other areas for children looked fun and spacious.  The only fault I could see and is the pool is very small and always full so we never used it. You are right opposite the beach so you can always swim there. The park was about $40 more a night than the one in Torquay we stayed at the week before, but in saying that it was worth it and you get what you pay for,  we would do it again.

we had a 2 bed beach side villa over looking the road and fine views of the waves .
bbq area well presented and clean , heated pool to 27c .( lovely )
easy drive or walk back into the main shopping area .

slight hiccup that I did not receive the code to the lock box to gain our key when we arrived but all good, just called the afterhours number & they were able to sort it out.
Got to see the Koala in the tree near reception which was awesome.

Arrived early but friendly reception quickly rearranged our accommodation to a glamping tent that was ready ( as it turned out best site ever ).
Everyone so friendly and organised activities for the grandkids a real bonus.
Second Labour Day weekend we have stayed and will certainly return.
The great beach weather also was a bonus.

Hands down the best big 4 we have stayed at!
Staff were amazing. The park was so clean.
Bathrooms were amazing.
So much for the kids to do.
Our camp site was immaculate.

We stayed here the long weekend and I loved how wholesome it was for our family.
Very inclusive for the kids - scavenger hunts, marshmellows to toast, light shows, live music, face painting, reptile show, kids club! It was so great!!

Haven’t  stopped talking about how fab it was!

Thank you team
Comfortable, clean cabins, Friendly staff and lots of family entertainment if you have children.

The Holiday Park is at the northern end of Apollo Bay so it's a bit of a distance to the main shopping area in town. The staff were super friendly and welcoming during check in. The park itself is well maintained, clean and has lots of facilities. The time I stayed they had a movie night for the kids and also a light show.
Fully equipped cabin for what I needed. Beautiful view. Friendly staff. Offered me a service for the middle of my stay.

We stayed on one of the caravan ensuite sites. The park is spotlessly clean, friendly and helpful. There is a kids light show in the evenings and a beautiful communal firepit to toast marshmallows by. They even give you the marshmallows. Excellent service. We'll definitely be back :-)

Comfortable cabin with basic kitchen. |Comfortable beds with fresh white linen and large towels. |Nice mix of pillows. |Clean bathroom. Separate toilet. |Park facilities varied and very good. |Video events short and informative. |Great venue on Great Ocean Road. |

We had a fantastic experience at big4 apollo with the family.
We stayed in the glamping tents which were really well thought out and had a really great view.
The staff were welcoming and knowledgeable and nothing was too much trouble. They thought of everything even a bag of marshmallows and sticks for the fire pit.
The facilities were next level, kids loved the light show and jumping pillow, amongst the many other things to do.
The scavenger hunt was cool and we loved finding real koalas too.
Would not hesitate to stay again, this time for longer though.
Our stay at Big4 Pisces Apollo Bay was truly amazing. With beautiful ocean views, watching sunrise, and great park for kids. Lots of other areas for kids to explore.
Stayed on a van site. We had beautiful views.  Weather was a little overcast and hazy but still enjoyable.  The amenities were top class. Would recommend this caravan park.
Very nice place well kept and staff are brilliant.  I will be back

We drove 3000 km across the Nullabor to stay in this caravan park. We were so looking forward to relaxing in beautiful surroundings with an ocean out look. Unfortunately our site was located opposite a a active building site and behind a noisy swimming pool. No view and it was hot an oppressive. I asked to change site but no other options were available. We ended up staying elsewhere 2 out of the 4 nights. A very expensive mistake. We were refunded $80  outof total $320 and alternative accomodation cost an extra $100.. ouch. Would not recommend

We could not have asked for a better park, everyone was so helpful and the staff went above and beyond. I requested a site and cabin near each other and we couldn’t have asked for a better allocation as we were across the road from each other. The views were pretty amazing too! The kids had the best time as there was so much to do. The light show was phenomenal, the playground with the water play was a massive hit and we had so much fun doing the scavenger hunt.
The park was very clean and all facilities were clean and in working order.
We would happily come back here again!

Such a hidden gem of a place (well not hidden, it was almost fully booked). There is a lot to do in and around town, from great food, walking tracks, beautiful beaches, forest drives and hiking trails. Definitely a place to use as a base if you love exploring, or just as a stop over on your longer journey.
The park is really well maintained with a swimming pool (outdoor and heated), a kids under cover play area that doubles as a venue for the nightly light show (a must see), a fire pit for roasting some marshmallows and a play area for the kids. There is even an onsite coffee van that is open every morning.

We recently stayed at the park for a few nights and had an excellent experience. Our cabin was spotless, well-maintained, and equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The park’s facilities exceeded our expectations—clean BBQ areas, spacious outdoor dining spaces, and a fantastic pool area. Everything was well-kept and inviting. We will definitely be returning in the future and highly recommend this park to our family and friends!

We had a powered caravan site which although difficult to get into was nice and large.
Only downfall was the cost of $85.00 per night, which we thought was rather high as this was out of school holidays.
Having travelled around Australia this was by far the most expensive we have ever paid.
We loved this park.  Everything about it was immaculate.  Of course you pay a little more for this, but for us it was worth it.  We would highly recommend this park.  Thank you for a fabulous stay!
Sehr schöner Camping
Will definitely be back.. One of the nicest parks we've ever stayed at. 5 stars all the way

Our caravan site was perfect. A lovely sea view and a lovely area. All within walking distance of Apollo Bay.
Well worth the visit and the cabins looked fine.

The ensuite site was excellent and position close to al the amenities. The ensuite was clean and and good size. The site was easy to set up van. The staff was helpful and was able to fix any problems I had. The activities were great too. The staff kept us informed with everything that was happening in the park

Hands down the best caravan park we have stayed at during our 3 month journey. Coming from Port Campbell it was chalk and cheese. It’s extremely well maintained, plenty of activities for kids. Excellent location. Honestly difficult to fault. I’d highly recommend for anyone on the road needing a ‘break stay’ somewhere you can just relax at!

Great time staying at Pisces holiday park. The staff were very welcoming and helpful.
The facilities were well maintained and looked after by guests and especially the cleaning team.
Great job all round guys!

Super happy with our stay in the 3bedroom beach view cabin. It was beautifully clean, stocked with basics (even a foil sheet for the oven trays was provided!!!) and the linen provided was of thick cotton. Everything was in working order. Staff - Knowledgable and Kind!. Even the local wildlife were humbling. The park facility's, grounds including bbq, pools, bathrooms and children amusement areas were extremely clean and maintained. Loved that they had extra activities on offer such night kids light show, open air movies, coffee vans etc. We are looking forward to visiting another Big4 in the future!!!

My mother & I stayed here in the Beach Tents. The view was stunning directly to the beach. The tents were beautifully decorated & had super comfy beds, pillows, linen & towels.a great bbq &outdoor fridge as well as the well equipped indoor kitchen. I loved the accom. The walls are canvas so the doing of the Ocean is quite loud & the wind causes a bit of flapping. Again I loved this aspect,a real glamping feel. My mum on the other hand said it impacted her sleep.so choose the right accom option for your preference. The solid cabins looked equally good with great views if that’s more your thing. The park itself is amazing. An outdoor fire pit overlooking the ocean, outdoorTVareas, a coffee van & good mentors you can really tell they are investing in the park to make it top in class. As for the service,couldn’t fault it. They really couldn’t do enough for you. Well done to the team this is one of the best parks I’ve stayed in & I will be coming back with my caravan (the van spots are awesome) next year.

This is the best campsite we have stayed in on our Adelaide to Sydney adventure - the pitches are spacious and all have a great view, the facilities are incredible and the staff are so welcoming, nothing is too much trouble 💖 We have loved our new at Apollo Bay and will definitely try and get back here again (although it's a long way from UK!) Thanks again for the fabulous stay and for introducing us to Kevin, the koala 🐨 xx

What a Beautiful place, Apollo Bay. Go to the Fish Co-Op and buy a yummy cooked lobster, melt in your mouth. The Big 4 is amazing. We stayed in Our Campervan. Marshmellows are given at check in to roast in the fire pit. Kids playground is awesome and the surrounds and views are gorgeous. We Love Apollo Bay and Apollo Bay BIG 4 😍
Loved this park! Great location, close to shops with great views of ocean.  Staff were exceptional, extremely helpful and the heated pool was great!  Would definitely come here again
